The '''Luxe Flightwing''' was a limited-production, swift, gleaming white [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. The Flightwing consisted of a curved nose and swept-back wings, having such a unique profile that it was nearly unforgettable to those who saw it. Its exterior surface was made of a rare, white ore.

In [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], dangerous convict [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], recently escaped from the planet [[Vanqor]],<ref>Zan Arbor escaped at the conclusion of the Jedi [[Mission to Typha-Dor]].</ref> purchased a Luxe Flightwing, which enabled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to [[Mission to Romin|track down]] the deranged [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] through her singularly uncommon ship-purchase to the planet [[Romin]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]'' {{1st}}
